text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out one day to grab some magazines when I
happen to see Fuji Kiseki and Zenno Rob Roy
together.
choice_data_list: Well, aren't you an unlikely pair.
Well, aren't you an unlikely pair.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm Rob Roy's sister today.
choice_data_list: I'm sorry, what?
I'm sorry, what?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um, well... It all started when I first got here...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm still a ways off from the bookstore... Oh, I
hope they'll still have signed copies of the book I
want...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Being in such a fancy place is just too
much for me!

text_block_list.name: Scammer A (Woman)
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, miss! Can I interest you in a jar of
fortune?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! A-are you talking to me? Sorry, I... I have
somewhere to be...

text_block_list.name: Scammer A (Woman)
text_block_list.text:
Aw, don't be like that! ♪ Look, our store's right
around the corner!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There you are, Rob Roy! Sorry I'm late.

text_block_list.name: Scammer A (Woman)
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you were waiting for your sister! Why don't
you both come check out our wares?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but we have to drop off something we
found at the police station. Our mom works there,
so she'll know what to do with it.

text_block_list.name: Scammer A (Woman)
text_block_list.text:
Your mom's a cop?! ...Ahem. I mean, it's too bad
you're busy, but oh well! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-thanks for that... I didn't know how to get out
of that situation alone...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's no problem! But what are you doing here,
anyway? Is there a book you want that you can't
get anywhere else?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly it! A store nearby is selling signed
copies of my favorite mystery writer's newest
book!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Huh. Well, would it be all right if I accompanied
you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There's a book I want to buy too. And besides, I'm too worried about letting my dear little sister go there by herself.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So, I'm going to be Rob Roy's personal
bodyguard until we reach the bookstore.
choice_data_list: In that case, I'll be your bodyguard!
In that case, I'll be your bodyguard!
You two really do look like sisters!
You two really do look like sisters!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So, I'm going to be Rob Roy's personal
bodyguard until we reach the bookstore.
choice_data_list: In that case, I'll be your bodyguard!
In that case, I'll be your bodyguard!
You two really do look like sisters!
You two really do look like sisters!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Can you really protect me?
choice_data_list: I am older than you, you know!
I am older than you, you know!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Does that make you my overprotective
older brother, then?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Does that make you my overprotective
older sister, then?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
How fun! Looks like shopping is getting more and
more exciting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, the bookstore does still have signed
copies of the book Zenno Rob Roy wants.
choice_data_list: Wait, where's Fuji?

text_block_list.name: Scammer B (Woman)
text_block_list.text:
Like I said, if you debut with our company, you're
sure to become rich and famous! I guarantee it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for your offer, but I have no intention of
changing careers.
choice_data_list: What do you want with my sister?

text_block_list.name: Scammer B (Woman)
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Are you her brother? I was just offering
your sibling a chance to make it big in the world
of entertainment!

text_block_list.name: Scammer A (Woman)
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Are you her sister? I was just offering your
sibling a chance to make it big in the world of
entertainment!

text_block_list.name: Scammer B (Woman)
text_block_list.text:
She said she'd rather continue racing than
become an entertainer, but don't you think she'd
be better off in show business?
choice_data_list:
No, actually, because I respect my sister's
wishes.

text_block_list.name: Scammer B (Woman)
text_block_list.text:
She said she'd rather continue racing than
become an entertainer, but don't you think she'd
be better off in show business?
choice_data_list:
No, actually, because I respect my sister's
wishes.

text_block_list.name: Scammer B (Woman)
text_block_list.text:
But come on! Just look at her! She's clearly better
suited to a life filled with glitz and glam, not
sweat and dirt!
choice_data_list: Say what you want, but her dream is to race.

text_block_list.name: Scammer B (Woman)
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Fine. Don't say I didn't try to give you a
chance.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I can't believe you were scouted like that,
Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Talent scouts" like that are usually scammers.
They're nothing to get starry-eyed over.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Also... Thanks for defending my dream. I'm glad I
have an older brother who's so supportive of me.
choice_data_list: You're very welcome!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Also... Thanks for defending my dream. I'm glad I
have an older sister who's so supportive of me.
choice_data_list: You're very welcome!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm so glad my older siblings are such
wonderful people.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm so glad my older sisters are such
wonderful people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we dip into a cafe for a break, then
head back home. It's fully dark by the time we
reach the academy.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for everything today! I'll be
sure to pay you back for your kindness!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'd better go too. It was fun having you as my
older brother today.
choice_data_list: I can be your older brother whenever you'd like.
I can be your older sister whenever you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'd better go too. It was fun having you as my
older sister today.
choice_data_list: I can be your older brother whenever you'd like.
I can be your older sister whenever you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks. But I'll be your bodyguard next time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Knowing you were there to protect me today
made me happy, but I want to show off my cool
side too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And that goes double when I'm showing off to my
older brother.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And that goes double when I'm showing off to my
older sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She winks mischievously at me, and I laugh.
Whatever she wishes for or dreams of, I'll be there
to make sure they come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell them that their hair and eye color are so
similar, I'm sure nobody would raise an eyebrow if
they claimed to be sisters.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But Fuji is so wonderful, and I'm nothing like her...
I couldn't possibly claim to be her sister...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Why not, though? I'd love to have a sister like
you. Every day would be so fun!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We could talk about plays together. After all, you
always have the most interesting story analysis!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you. I always have a great time when we
talk too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm honored to hear that. Now come on, little
sister! Off to the bookstore we go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since I was headed for the bookstore myself, we
all go together.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm so glad I finally got a copy! Thank you,
both of you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No problem. By the way, do you two happen to
be free after this?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The theaters are showing a live broadcast of the
play my mother's in, and I was wondering if you'd
like to watch it together.
choice_data_list: Sure! Sounds fun!
Sure! Sounds fun!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I'd love to go as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We make our way to the movie theater and enjoy
the play together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's mother is still as popular as ever. Her
performance, as always, captures the hearts of
everyone watching.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah... That was incredible. I wish I could rewatch
the part where they made an oath together.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Me too! I was so moved by the scene where they
hinted that the river wolf was the reincarnation of
the protagonist's late mother!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Wait, if the river wolf was the mother... Hm, that
would entirely change the meaning of that fight
scene...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki is bright and animated as she talks
about the play. She seems so happy to have
found a kindred spirit in Zenno Rob Roy.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
U-um, what's the matter? Is there something on
my face?
choice_data_list:
No, sorry. I was just thinking about how well you
two get along.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same. If you don't mind, Rob Roy, I'd
love to watch another play with you sometime
and discuss it after.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, if you don't think I'd be a bother, I'd be
delighted to join you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They seemed like an odd pair at first, but after a
day together, it's clear they're sisters in all but
blood.
